data.content: Implementation commit 8929ae99 pushed to branch worktree-foolery-062f. Files changed: src/lib/agent-session-runtime.ts (terminateProcessGroup signature + two console.warn), src/lib/agent-session-runtime-helpers.ts (watchdog_timeout reason), src/lib/terminal-manager.ts (external_abort reason), src/lib/__tests__/agent-session-runtime-lifecycle.test.ts (2 new tests + 2 updated). All quality gates passed: lint, tsc --noEmit, 2711 tests pass, build green.
